arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford exit confirmed as wish granted - Man Utd's perfect January transfer window
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to enter their first transfer window with Ruben Amorim in charge and their first since sporting director Dan Ashworth's Old Trafford exit

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Newcastle – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United welcome Newcastle United to the Premier League this evening, aiming to avoid a fourth consecutive defeat in all competitions. Ruben Amorim has endured a challenging start to his tenure at Old Trafford. United bowed out of the Carabao Cup at Tottenham earlier this month, before disappointing defeats to Bournemouth and Wolves. arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim is about to get the Manchester United luxury he has been waiting for
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim will be glad to see the back of a chaotic December when his side faces Newcastle United on Monday night.

arts.ttl: Six moves Man Utd should make in the 2025 January transfer window: Sell Marcus Rashford, lock down Amad Diallo's future and find a new left-back
arts.sum: Despite spending around £600 million ($752m) on new players in the last three summers and having one of the biggest wage bills in Europe, United somehow have a squad that is barely fit for purpose, especially not one that chimes with Ruben Amorim's vision for the team. Here's what the Red Devils should do when the window opens to give Ruben Amorim the best chance of getting the team back on track

arts.ttl: Manchester United Predicted Lineup vs. Newcastle United: Premier League
arts.sum: Manchester United will be without club captain Bruno Fernandes who will serve his one game suspension.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Newcastle – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United battle it out with Newcastle in the Premier League at Old Trafford tonight. The Red Devils were out-fought again on Boxing Day as they succumbed to defeat at Wolverhampton Wanderers. United captain Bruno Fernandes is suspended after he was sent off for the third time this season at Molineux. arts.ttl: Alan Shearer picks side in Marcus Rashford vs Ruben Amorim debate at struggling Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United will enter 2025 in a mess, with the ongoing exile of Marcus Rashford providing a distraction for Ruben Amorim - and Alan Shearer believes something has to give

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes young fan's 'dream come true' with a touching gesture - as Man United's 'humble' boss takes him for a lap around Carrington in his car
arts.sum: Amorim, who has endured a difficult start to life as Red Devils boss with three defeats on the spin, was labelled 'a humble, normal man' after making the touching gesture.

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro call and Alejandro Garnacho decision - Manchester United predicted XI vs Newcastle
arts.sum: Man United will be eyeing a return to winning ways when they face Newcastle United at Old Trafford on Monday evening.

arts.ttl: Manchester United without five stars for Newcastle test
arts.sum: Captain Bruno Fernandes will sit the game out having picked up a one-match suspension following his red card in the Boxing Day defeat at Wolves. On the injury front, Amorim is without former England and Chelsea midfielder Mason Mount, who is sidelined for several week after picking up an injury against Man City, while defender Victor Lindelof came off at half-time in the Carabao Cup defeat to Tottenham and will again miss today's game.
